name: check-shotstack-fixed
description: Robust Shotstack render status check with error handling, retry, and idempotence

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, contentIdeaId: $('Validate Input').item.json.contentIdeaId, shotstackStatus: $('Build Update Payload').item.json.patch.shotstack_status } }}
={{ { ok: true, contentIdeaId: $('Validate Input').item.json.contentIdeaId, pending: true, shotstackStatus: $json.shotstackStatus, message: $json.message } }}
